I completed the approved Phase 0 `chain:runtime` slice: workspace wiring only. The root workspace now activates the chain anchor and pins the baseline `stable2407` Substrate dependency line in [Cargo.toml](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260320-01KM788FQ46GJ4DQR8X3F7A503/worktree/Cargo.toml):1. I added the new chain package/manifests at [crates/myosu-chain/Cargo.toml](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260320-01KM788FQ46GJ4DQR8X3F7A503/worktree/crates/myosu-chain/Cargo.toml):1, [crates/myosu-chain/src/lib.rs](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260320-01KM788FQ46GJ4DQR8X3F7A503/worktree/crates/myosu-chain/src/lib.rs):1, [crates/myosu-chain/runtime/Cargo.toml](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260320-01KM788FQ46GJ4DQR8X3F7A503/worktree/crates/myosu-chain/runtime/Cargo.toml):1, [crates/myosu-chain/common/Cargo.toml](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260320-01KM788FQ46GJ4DQR8X3F7A503/worktree/crates/myosu-chain/common/Cargo.toml):1, and [crates/myosu-chain/node/Cargo.toml](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260320-01KM788FQ46GJ4DQR8X3F7A503/worktree/crates/myosu-chain/node/Cargo.toml):1. `Cargo.lock` was refreshed to record the new package graph.

I also wrote the implementation-stage curated artifacts at [outputs/chain/runtime/implementation.md](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260320-01KM788FQ46GJ4DQR8X3F7A503/worktree/outputs/chain/runtime/implementation.md):1, [outputs/chain/runtime/verification.md](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260320-01KM788FQ46GJ4DQR8X3F7A503/worktree/outputs/chain/runtime/verification.md):1, and [outputs/chain/runtime/integration.md](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260320-01KM788FQ46GJ4DQR8X3F7A503/worktree/outputs/chain/runtime/integration.md):1. I did not create `quality.md` or `promotion.md` because those are owned by later stages.

**Verification**

I ran `cargo metadata --no-deps --format-version 1`, `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/myosu-chain-phase0-anchor cargo build -p myosu-chain --release --offline`, and `CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/home/r/.cache/rust-tmp/myosu-chain-phase0-runtime-check cargo check -p myosu-runtime --offline`. The anchor crate build passed, and the runtime check now reaches the inherited runtime source instead of failing with “package not found.”

The next blocker is now clearly the old runtime file itself at [crates/myosu-chain/runtime/src/lib.rs](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260320-01KM788FQ46GJ4DQR8X3F7A503/worktree/crates/myosu-chain/runtime/src/lib.rs):9 and [crates/myosu-chain/runtime/src/lib.rs](/home/r/.fabro/runs/20260320-01KM788FQ46GJ4DQR8X3F7A503/worktree/crates/myosu-chain/runtime/src/lib.rs):13, which still expects missing modules, missing WASM build output, and subtensor/frontier-era crates. That sets up the next approved slice cleanly: Phase 1 minimal runtime replacement.
